Patch Set 1:

For testing this, the patch should also remove the use of tgt_page_to_corrupt and actually corrupt the read page in cache when the OBD_FAIL is hit, and this patch should invalidate the cached page.  The use of tgt_page_to_corrupt is really a hack.

It may be once that hack is removed a similar change is needed in ZFS.

Patch Set 1:

Code-wise looks good to me.
